cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. Alright, the key here is to look at all the times Steven was seen doing different activities, and then find the time periods when he wasn't doing any of those things. Since the gas station was closed after 10pm, we also need to consider that. First, let me list all the times Steven was accounted for: - Steven woke up at 7am. But waking up doesn't necessarily mean he was doing something else, so maybe that's just a starting point. But Ashley saw Steven stretching at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So from 7am to 10am, he's at yoga. Then, William saw him at the library from 1pm to 2pm. So between 1 and 2, he's reading. Next, Jennifer saw him at the office from 2pm to 3pm. So 2-3 he's working. Michael saw him at the movie theater from 3pm to 7pm. So from 3pm until 7pm, he's watching a movie. Mary saw him at the train station from 7pm to 10pm.
